# K Nearest Neighbor

**Summary**: A non-parametric algorithm that classifies data based on the proximity to known samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-alsaihati|Alsaihati, 2021]] used K-nearest neighbor to evaluate detection and prediction of lost circulation.

## Key Results and Findings

- Outperformed other models in detecting loss with an F1-score of 0.80 and RMSE of 0.17 in Well-8. ([[2021-alsaihati|Alsaihati, 2021, p. 15]])
